title: Prohibited Goods System
description: Cities can prohibit certain goods from being sold within their borders. Each city has a list of banned goods that cannot be legally traded there. This creates opportunities for smuggling at higher risk/reward.
definition-of-done: Cities have prohibited goods lists. Legal trade blocked for prohibited goods. Prohibition visible in city info. Prohibition can change over time.
testing-plan: Verify prohibited goods lists work. Test legal trade blocking. Verify UI shows prohibitions. Test prohibition changes.
todos: Build prohibition display in city UI
